text: SAMPLE/FORMAT ONLY -- NOT A REAL STRESS-TEST PATIENT. A 40-year-old patient with a placeholder condition, used only to document the schema 정원 should follow when converting 지우's answer key. Replace with the real base vignette for patient T001.

SAMPLE/FORMAT ONLY -- NOT REAL. Same base patient as T001, but this variant's text has been corrupted per one of the 7 broken-input types 지우 is testing (e.g. a missing lab value, a stale date, an ambiguous phrase). patient_id MUST be the base id plus a single lowercase suffix letter a-g.
